vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #736

plan.title: fix(tasks/core.yml): task build cross-platform artifact parity defect (Windows zip lacks excludes; vestigial-vs-internal purpose unclear)

narratives.Description: fix(tasks/core.yml): task build cross-platform artifact parity defect (Windows zip lacks excludes; vestigial-vs-internal purpose unclear)
narratives.Problem: task build's Windows branch (Compress-Archive) doesn't apply the Linux/macOS tar exclude list (.git, dist, backup, node_modules). Windows zips include hundreds of MB of .git history and recursively zip the prior dist/ output; CI never catches this because no test asserts artifact-shape parity across platform branches.
narratives.Acceptance: Replace the Linux/macOS tar + Windows Compress-Archive split with a single Python helper (scripts/build_dist.py) using stdlib tarfile/zipfile and a canonical exclude list. Update tasks/core.yml::build to dispatch to the helper as a single command. Apply the same simplification to tasks/core.yml::clean. Add tests/cli/test_build_dist.py covering exclude correctness, expected-paths-present, artifact size ceiling, idempotent re-run, and end-to-end smoke. Add tests/content/test_taskfile_zip_parity.py guarding against regression to the verbose duplicated shape. CHANGELOG entry citing #736; task ci:local green.
narratives.OutOfScope: Decision on whether task build is vestigial or has internal consumers (separate scope question; this issue's deliverable is parity).
narratives.Files: NEW scripts/build_dist.py; tasks/core.yml (build + clean); NEW tests/cli/test_build_dist.py; NEW tests/content/test_taskfile_zip_parity.py; CHANGELOG.md (append).

items.title: NEW scripts/build_dist.py: cross-platform tarfile/zipfile + canonical exclude list
tasks/core.yml::build dispatches to scripts/build_dist.py as a single command (no platform split)
tasks/core.yml::clean simplified to a single cross-platform command
NEW tests/cli/test_build_dist.py covers excludes, expected paths, size ceiling, idempotent re-run, end-to-end smoke
NEW tests/content/test_taskfile_zip_parity.py guards against regression to verbose duplicated shape

references.title: Issue #736: fix(tasks/core.yml): task build cross-platform artifact parity defect (Windows zip lacks excludes; vestigial-vs-internal purpose unclear)

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.
